---
title: Introduction to the special issue "In-depth study of air pollution sources and processes within Beijing and its surrounding
  region (APHH-Beijing)"
date: '2019-01-01'
author:
- Z. Shi
- T. Vu
- S. Kotthaus
- R. M. Harrison
- S. Grimmond
- S. Yue
- T. Zhu
- J. Lee
- Y. Han
- M. Demuzere
- R. E. Dunmore
- L. Ren
- D. Liu
- Y. Wang
- O. Wild
- J. Allan
- W. J. Acton
- J. Barlow
- B. Barratt
- D. Beddows
- W. J. Bloss
- G. Calzolai
- D. Carruthers
- D. C. Carslaw
- Q. Chan
- L. Chatzidiakou
- Y. Chen
- L. Crilley
- H. Coe
- T. Dai
- R. Doherty
- F. Duan
- P. Fu
- B. Ge
- M. Ge
- D. Guan
- J. F. Hamilton
- K. He
- M. Heal
- D. Heard
- C. N. Hewitt
- M. Hollaway
- M. Hu
- D. Ji
- X. Jiang
- R. Jones
- M. Kalberer
- F. J. Kelly
- L. Kramer
- B. Langford
- C. Lin
- A. C. Lewis
- J. Li
- W. Li
- H. Liu
- J. Liu
- M. Loh
- K. Lu
- F. Lucarelli
- G. Mann
- G. McFiggans
- M. R. Miller
- G. Mills
- P. Monk
- E. Nemitz
- F. O'Connor
- B. Ouyang
- P. I. Palmer
- C. Percival
- O. Popoola
- C. Reeves
- A. R. Rickard
- L. Shao
- G. Shi
- D. Spracklen
- D. Stevenson
- Y. Sun
- Z. Sun
- S. Tao
- S. Tong
- Q. Wang
- W. Wang
- X. Wang
- X. Wang
- Z. Wang
- L. Wei
- L. Whalley
- X. Wu
- Z. Wu
- P. Xie
- F. Yang
- Q. Zhang
- Y. Zhang
- Y. Zhang
- M. Zheng
categories:
- Journal Article
doi: 10.5194/acp-19-7519-2019
publication: '*Atmospheric Chemistry and Physics*'
url_pdf: https://www.atmos-chem-phys.net/19/7519/2019/
---

## Introduction to the special issue "In-depth study of air pollution sources and processes within Beijing and its surrounding region (APHH-Beijing)"

<p class="pub-meta">Z. Shi, T. Vu, S. Kotthaus, R. M. Harrison, S. Grimmond, S. Yue, T. Zhu, J. Lee, Y. Han, M. Demuzere, R. E. Dunmore, L. Ren, D. Liu, Y. Wang, O. Wild, J. Allan, W. J. Acton, J. Barlow, B. Barratt, D. Beddows, W. J. Bloss, G. Calzolai, D. Carruthers, D. C. Carslaw, Q. Chan, L. Chatzidiakou, Y. Chen, L. Crilley, H. Coe, T. Dai, R. Doherty, F. Duan, P. Fu, B. Ge, M. Ge, D. Guan, J. F. Hamilton, K. He, M. Heal, D. Heard, C. N. Hewitt, M. Hollaway, M. Hu, D. Ji, X. Jiang, R. Jones, M. Kalberer, F. J. Kelly, L. Kramer, B. Langford, C. Lin, A. C. Lewis, J. Li, W. Li, H. Liu, J. Liu, M. Loh, K. Lu, F. Lucarelli, G. Mann, G. McFiggans, M. R. Miller, G. Mills, P. Monk, E. Nemitz, F. O'Connor, B. Ouyang, P. I. Palmer, C. Percival, O. Popoola, C. Reeves, A. R. Rickard, L. Shao, G. Shi, D. Spracklen, D. Stevenson, Y. Sun, Z. Sun, S. Tao, S. Tong, Q. Wang, W. Wang, X. Wang, X. Wang, Z. Wang, L. Wei, L. Whalley, X. Wu, Z. Wu, P. Xie, F. Yang, Q. Zhang, Y. Zhang, Y. Zhang, M. Zheng</p>

_*Atmospheric Chemistry and Physics*_, 2019


<div class="pub-links">
<a href="https://doi.org/10.5194/acp-19-7519-2019" class="btn btn-primary btn-sm" target="_blank"><i class="bi bi-box-arrow-up-right"></i> DOI</a>
<a href="https://www.atmos-chem-phys.net/19/7519/2019/" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm" target="_blank"><i class="bi bi-file-pdf"></i> PDF</a>
<a href="acp-19-7519-2019.bib" class="btn btn-outline-secondary btn-sm"><i class="bi bi-download"></i> BibTeX</a>
</div>
